'''sapazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mleccha|mleccha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mleccha|mleccha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sapazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæpæzhæth|sæpæzhæth]] || [[word:sæpæzhæj|sæpæzhæj]] || [[word:sæpæzhæsh|sæpæzhæsh]] || [[word:sæpæzhæ|sæpæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sapapazhath|sapapazhath]] || [[word:sapapazhaj|sapapazhaj]] || [[word:sapapazhash|sapapazhash]] || [[word:sapapazha|sapapazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sapazhath|sapazhath]] || [[word:sapazhaj|sapazhaj]] || [[word:sapazhash|sapazhash]] || [[word:sapazha|sapazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sapafzhath|sapafzhath]] || [[word:sapafzhaj|sapafzhaj]] || [[word:sapafzhash|sapafzhash]] || [[word:sapafzhaf|sapafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sapazhatha|sapazhatha]] || [[word:sapazhaja|sapazhaja]] || [[word:sapazhasha|sapazhasha]] || [[word:sapazhaka|sapazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sapazhath|sapazhath]] || [[word:sapazhaj|sapazhaj]] || [[word:sapazhash|sapazhash]] || [[word:sapazha|sapazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sapazhathal|sapazhathal]] || [[word:sapazhajal|sapazhajal]] || [[word:sapazhashal|sapazhashal]] || [[word:sapazhakal|sapazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sapazhathatha|sapazhathatha]] || [[word:sapazhajaja|sapazhajaja]] || [[word:sapazhashasha|sapazhashasha]] || [[word:sapazhaka|sapazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sapazhathan|sapazhathan]] || [[word:sapazhajan|sapazhajan]] || [[word:sapazhashan|sapazhashan]] || [[word:sapazhakan|sapazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sapazhathaoro|sapazhathaoro]] || [[word:sapazhajaoro|sapazhajaoro]] || [[word:sapazhashaoro|sapazhashaoro]] || [[word:sapazhakaoro|sapazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
